findings.title: Dismiss/timeout fallback behavior is not fully specified
findings.detail: FR-002 requires more than showing text before AskUserQuestion: the workflow must keep waiting for typed input when buttons are missing, dismissed, or timed out, validate that input against the current state's allowed options, and reprompt on invalid responses. The plan only describes dual-display and skip logic, so the core fallback/error-handling contract is still undefined.
findings.suggested_resolution: Add an explicit per-handoff interaction pattern covering wait, validation, and retry behavior.

findings.title: Task coverage does not match the required transition-point behavior
findings.detail: T020 adds only a status message at line ~75 without adding text fallback prompt. T016 and T017 call for 'dual-display' but don't explicitly require 1-line status messages. Not all handoff points get both elements (status + text fallback).
findings.suggested_resolution: Add concrete tasks for each affected handoff so every transition point gets both elements.
